name: webhook
description: Send HTTP webhooks to any URL on agent events

webhook.url.title: Webhook URL
webhook.url.description: Target URL for webhook POST requests

webhook.secret.title: Secret
webhook.secret.description: Shared secret for HMAC-SHA256 signature (X-Webhook-Signature header)

webhook.notifyOnAgentComplete.title: Notify on agent completion
webhook.notifyOnAgentComplete.description: Send webhook when an AI agent completes a task

webhook.notifyOnFileChange.title: Notify on file changes
webhook.notifyOnFileChange.description: Send webhook when watched files change

tools.name: webhook_send
tools.description: Send a custom webhook POST request to the configured URL
